calendar.matters:
Motion To Apportion Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Sep-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled the day for Motion to Apportion Settlement Funds.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jeffrey Wehr, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Birgitta Gullstrand, and with plaintiff Tony Fryklund, who was placed under oath and examined.
Carola Bjork, Successor-in-Interest to Carl-Axel Fryklund, Deceased, was present, placed under oath and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the claimants on the litigation proceeds are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying survival, and wrongful death action, in the following proportions:

Estate of Carl-Axel Fryklund - 25%
Tony Fryklund - 50%
Birgitta Gullstrand - 25%

Attorneys' Fees - $1,001.00.
Balance - $83,353.15.

Any future net settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall submit a proposed order to the Court no later than September 16, 2008.
